metadata.name: Send an Engagement Letter to a New Client

description: After a new client agrees to retain the firm, a paralegal needs to send them the official engagement letter for signature.

nodes.task_description: Select the firm's standard engagement letter template.
Populate the template with the client's name, the scope of the representation, and the agreed-upon fee structure.

expected_outcome.value: Agent customizes the letter for the specific client and matter.

nodes.task_description: Send the engagement letter to the client for their review and signature via an e-signature platform.

expected_outcome.value: The client receives the letter and can sign it electronically.
